sans.$value: 'Gotham', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'

primary.$description: Sprig Green — 12-step primary scale. Step 9 = hero/accent (#69c14c). Brand-provided values: 50-950 (11 colors). Steps 5=9 and 6=10 share values — expected for limited palettes (see Radix 12-step docs).

overlay.$description: Neutral gray scale. Consumer values: 50=#fff, 100=#f9f9f9, 200=#f5f5f5, 400=#a7a8aa, 500=#545454, 900=#2c2826. Steps 4-7 and 9-10 are interpolated. Corporate site mapping: super light grey=step 2, light grey=step 3, lg-med grey=step 8, mid grey=step 11, dark grey=step 12.

red.$description: Feedback Red — mapped from Tailwind Red palette per Figma spec.

on-primary.$description: Sprig uses light (white) text on primary green. Acorn uses dark (overlay-12).

focus-outline.$description: Sprig uses primary green for focus rings.

icon.$description: Figma: 'Icon (Gray)' = lg-med grey = overlay-8. Acorn: overlay-9.

icon-chevron.$description: Figma: 'Icon (Chevron)' = mid grey = overlay-11. Acorn: overlay-9.

link-active.$description: Uses primary-8 (#2f5d20) — acorn's primary-11 reference would resolve to #1f4114 which is too dark for link text.

rule-primary.$description: Figma: 'Border/Rule - Primary' = mid grey = overlay-11. Acorn: overlay-9.

rule-secondary.$description: Figma: 'Border/Rule - Secondary' = light grey = overlay-3. Acorn: overlay-5.

first-fg.$description: Sprig uses white text on primary green alertbar. Acorn: overlay-12.

primary-fill.$description: Figma: 'Button Primary Fill' = mid grey (overlay-11), NOT primary green. Acorn: interactive-primary.

hover.$description: Figma: 'Button Hover' = Medium Sea Green/400 (primary-9). Acorn: primary-10.

active.$description: Figma: 'Active Button' = Medium Sea Green/400 (primary-9). Acorn: primary-10.

bg.$description: Figma: 'Input Box' = super light grey = overlay-2. Acorn: overlay-1.

border.$description: Figma: 'Input Outline' = light grey = overlay-3. Acorn: overlay-5.

outline.$description: Figma: 'Input Outline' = light grey = overlay-3. Acorn: overlay-5.

inactive-item.$description: Figma: 'Table/Inactive Item' = lg-med grey = overlay-8. Acorn: overlay-6.

dropdown.$description: Sprig dropdowns use squared, subtle styling.

size.$description: Sprig uses tiny size. Acorn: small.

weight.$description: Sprig uses bold. Acorn: normal (small weight).

radius.$description: Sprig uses squared corners for most elements.

input-focus.$description: Sprig hides the input focus ring shadow. Acorn: 2px primary ring.

field-label.$description: Sprig uses smaller, lighter field labels.
